message.content:
@startuml
title Search Product by ID

actor User

participant "«main»\nMain" as Main
participant "«frame»\nMainMenu" as MainMenu
participant "«dialog»\nProductReportDialog" as PRD
participant "«DAO»\nProductDatabaseDAO" as DAO
database "Database" as DB
participant "«domain»\nProduct\n:product" as Product
participant "SimpleListModel\n:model" as Model

Main -> MainMenu : «create»
User -> MainMenu : clicks 'View Products'
activate MainMenu

MainMenu -> PRD : «create»
activate PRD

PRD -> DAO : «create»
activate DAO

note over PRD
as shown in
'View Products'
diagram
end note

PRD --> User : list of products\ndisplayed

User -> PRD : user types productID\ninto field; clicks "Search"
activate PRD

PRD -> DAO : findProd(productID)
activate DAO

DAO -> DB : search product by ID
activate DB
DB --> DAO : resultSet
deactivate DB

DAO -> DAO : extract product details\nfrom ResultSet into variables

DAO -> Product : «construct»
activate Product
DAO -> Product : set products fields\nfrom variables
deactivate Product

DAO -> Model : «construct»
activate Model
DAO -> Model : updateItems(products)
deactivate Model

DAO -> DAO : jList.setModel(model)

PRD --> User : product displayed

deactivate DAO
deactivate PRD
deactivate MainMenu

@enduml
